content:
# Numbers Chapter 2 — The EMET Bible (Literal)

**Translator:** EMET | **Source:** Leningrad Codex (B19A), pp. 147–148; Codex Vaticanus (Vat.gr.1209), pp. 111–112 (LXX) | **Source Images:** `source-texts/hebrew-OT/NUM_002_page_001.jpg`, `NUM_002_page_002.jpg`; `source-texts/greek-OT-LXX/NUM_002_vaticanus_page_001.jpg`, `NUM_002_vaticanus_page_002.jpg`

---

> **MANUSCRIPT OBSERVATION — THE ARRANGEMENT OF THE CAMP:** The Leningrad Codex continues on pages 147–148 with the ordinance of the tribal camp (דֶּגֶל, degel, "standard/banner"). YHWH commands that the Sons of Israel encamp each man by his own standard (דֶּגֶל), by the signs (אֹתֹת, otot) of the house of their fathers, at a distance surrounding (מִנֶּגֶד סָבִיב, mi-neged saviv) the Tent of Meeting. The chapter arranges the twelve tribes into four camps of three tribes each, stationed at the four cardinal points: east (Judah), south (Reuben), west (Ephraim), north (Dan). The Vaticanus LXX (pp. 111–112, continuing from Num 1) follows the MT structure precisely; δόγμα or τάγμα renders דֶּגֶל, and παρεμβάλλω renders חנה throughout. Notable: the LXX reads Ραγουηλ (= Re'u'el) in v. 14 where the MT has רְעוּאֵל, aligning with the 1:14 variant.

---

## The Command to Encamp by Standards (vv. 1–2)

**1** And-spoke [va-yedabber] YHWH unto Moses [el-Mosheh] and-unto Aaron [ve-el-Aharon], saying [le'mor]:

> **LXX:** Καὶ ἐλάλησεν κύριος πρὸς Μωυσῆν καὶ Ααρων λέγων — standard rendering; κύριος for YHWH.

**2** "Each-man [ish] by [al] his-standard [diglo], by-[the]-signs of [be-otot] the-house of [le-veit] their-fathers [avotam] shall-the-sons of [benei] Israel [Yisra'el] encamp [yakhanu]; at-a-distance [mi-neged], surrounding [saviv] the-tent of [le-ohel] meeting [mo'ed] they-shall-encamp [yakhanu]."

> **Key terms:** דֶּגֶל (degel) = "standard/banner" — the rallying ensign for each camp division. אֹתֹת (otot) = "signs" — identifying emblems of each paternal house. מִנֶּגֶד סָבִיב (mi-neged saviv) = "from opposite, surrounding" — at a distance around the Tabernacle. **LXX:** κατὰ τάγμα ("according to order/regiment") for דֶּגֶל; ἐναντίοι κύκλῳ ("opposite in a circle") for מנגד סביב. Vaticanus reads σκηνῆς τοῦ μαρτυρίου ("tent of the testimony") for אהל מועד.

---

## The East Camp: Judah (vv. 3–9)

**3** "And-those-encamping [ve-ha-khonim] eastward [qedmah], toward-the-sunrise [mizrakhah] — the-standard of [degel] the-camp of [makhaneh] Judah [Yhudah] by-their-hosts [le-tsiv'otam]; and-the-leader [ve-nasi'] of-the-sons of [li-vnei] Judah [Yhudah] — Nahshon [Nakhshon] son of [ben] Amminadab [Amminadav]."

> **Key terms:** קֵדְמָה מִזְרָחָה (qedmah mizrakhah) = "eastward, toward the sunrise" — the position of honor, first in march. **LXX:** πρῶτοι κατὰ ἀνατολάς ("first toward the east").

**4** "And-his-host [u-tseva'o] and-their-mustered-ones [u-fequdeihem] — four [arba'ah] and-seventy [ve-shiv'im] thousand [elef] and-six [ve-shesh] hundreds [me'ot]."

> 74,600. **LXX:** τέσσαρες καὶ ἑβδομήκοντα χιλιάδες καὶ ἑξακόσιοι — identical figure.

**5** "And-those-encamping [ve-ha-khonim] beside him [alav] — the-tribe of [matteh] Issachar [Yissakhar]; and-the-leader [ve-nasi'] of-the-sons of [li-vnei] Issachar [Yissakhar] — Nethanel [Netan'el] son of [ben] Zuar [Tsu'ar]."

> **LXX:** Ναθαναηλ υἱὸς Σωγαρ.

**6** "And-his-host [u-tseva'o] and-their-mustered-ones [u-fequdeihem] — four [arba'ah] and-fifty [va-khamishim] thousand [elef] and-four [ve-arba'] hundreds [me'ot]."

> 54,400. **LXX:** identical figure.

**7** "The-tribe of [matteh] Zebulun [Zvulun]; and-the-leader [ve-nasi'] of-the-sons of [li-vnei] Zebulun [Zvulun] — Eliab [Eli'av] son of [ben] Helon [Khelon]."

> **LXX:** Ελιαβ υἱὸς Χαιλων.

**8** "And-his-host [u-tseva'o] and-their-mustered-ones [u-fequdeihem] — seven [shiv'ah] and-fifty [va-khamishim] thousand [elef] and-four [ve-arba'] hundreds [me'ot]."

> 57,400. **LXX:** identical figure.

**9** "All [kol] the-mustered-ones [ha-pequdim] of-the-camp of [le-makhaneh] Judah [Yhudah] — a-hundred [me'ah] thousand [elef] and-eighty [u-shemonim] thousand [elef] and-six [ve-sheshet] thousands [alafim] and-four [ve-arba'] hundreds [me'ot], by-their-hosts [le-tsiv'otam]. First [rishonah] they-shall-set-out [yissa'u]."

> Total: 186,400. **Key term:** רִאשֹׁנָה יִסָּעוּ (rishonah yissa'u) = "first they shall set out" — Judah's camp leads the march. **LXX:** πρῶτοι ἐξαροῦσιν ("first they shall depart").

---

## The South Camp: Reuben (vv. 10–16)

**10** "The-standard of [degel] the-camp of [makhaneh] Reuben [Re'uven] — southward [teimanah], by-their-hosts [le-tsiv'otam]; and-the-leader [ve-nasi'] of-the-sons of [li-vnei] Reuben [Re'uven] — Elizur [Elitsur] son of [ben] Shedeur [Shedei'ur]."

> **Key term:** תֵּימָנָה (teimanah) = "southward" — from תֵּימָן (teiman, "south/Yemen"). **LXX:** λίβα ("south-southwest").

**11** "And-his-host [u-tseva'o] and-their-mustered-ones [u-fequdeihem] — six [shishah] and-forty [ve-arba'im] thousand [elef] and-five [va-khamesh] hundreds [me'ot]."

> 46,500. **LXX:** identical figure.

**12** "And-those-encamping [ve-ha-khonim] beside him [alav] — the-tribe of [matteh] Simeon [Shim'on]; and-the-leader [ve-nasi'] of-the-sons of [li-vnei] Simeon [Shim'on] — Shelumiel [Shelumi'el] son of [ben] Zurishaddai [Tsuri-shaddai]."

> **LXX:** Σαλαμιηλ υἱὸς Σουρισαδαι.

**13** "And-his-host [u-tseva'o] and-their-mustered-ones [u-fequdeihem] — nine [tishah] and-fifty [va-khamishim] thousand [elef] and-three [u-shelosh] hundreds [me'ot]."

> 59,300. **LXX:** identical figure.

**14** "And-the-tribe of [u-matteh] Gad [Gad]; and-the-leader [ve-nasi'] of-the-sons of [li-vnei] Gad [Gad] — Eliasaph [Elyasaf] son of [ben] Reuel [Re'u'el]."

> **Key term:** רְעוּאֵל (Re'u'el) — the Leningrad Codex reads resh here, whereas 1:14 reads דְּעוּאֵל (De'u'el) with dalet. This is the well-known dalet/resh graphic confusion in the Hebrew scribal tradition. **LXX:** Ελισαφ υἱὸς Ραγουηλ — Vaticanus consistently reads Ραγουηλ (= Re'u'el), supporting the resh reading.

**15** "And-his-host [u-tseva'o] and-their-mustered-ones [u-fequdeihem] — five [khamishah] and-forty [ve-arba'im] thousand [elef] and-six [ve-shesh] hundreds [me'ot] and-fifty [va-khamishim]."

> 45,650. **LXX:** identical figure.

**16** "All [kol] the-mustered-ones [ha-pequdim] of-the-camp of [le-makhaneh] Reuben [Re'uven] — a-hundred [me'ah] thousand [elef] and-one [ve-ekhad] and-fifty [va-khamishim] thousand [elef] and-four [ve-arba'] hundreds [me'ot] and-fifty [va-khamishim], by-their-hosts [le-tsiv'otam]. And-second [u-sheniyyim] they-shall-set-out [yissa'u]."

> Total: 151,450. **Key term:** וּשְׁנִיִּם יִסָּעוּ (u-sheniyyim yissa'u) = "and second they shall set out." **LXX:** δεύτεροι ἐξαροῦσιν ("second they shall depart").

---

## The Levites and the Tent of Meeting (v. 17)

**17** "And-shall-set-out [ve-nasa'] the-tent of [ohel] meeting [mo'ed], the-camp of [makhaneh] the-Levites [ha-Levi'im], in-the-midst of [be-tokh] the-camps [ha-makhanot]. As [ka'asher] they-encamp [yakhanu], so [ken] they-shall-set-out [yissa'u], each-man [ish] at [al] his-place [yado], by-their-standards [le-digleihem]."

> **Key terms:** בְּתוֹךְ הַמַּחֲנֹת (be-tokh ha-makhanot) = "in the midst of the camps" — the Levites occupy the center position. עַל־יָדוֹ (al-yado) = lit. "upon his hand" — i.e., at his assigned station/place. **LXX:** ἐν μέσῳ τῶν παρεμβολῶν ("in the middle of the camps"); κατὰ τάξιν ("according to order") for על ידו.

---

## The West Camp: Ephraim (vv. 18–24)

**18** "The-standard of [degel] the-camp of [makhaneh] Ephraim [Efrayim], by-their-hosts [le-tsiv'otam] — seaward [yammah]; and-the-leader [ve-nasi'] of-the-sons of [li-vnei] Ephraim [Efrayim] — Elishama [Elishama'] son of [ben] Ammihud [Ammihud]."

> **Key term:** יָמָּה (yammah) = "seaward" — i.e., westward, since the Mediterranean Sea lies to the west. **LXX:** παρὰ θάλασσαν ("toward the sea").

**19** "And-his-host [u-tseva'o] and-their-mustered-ones [u-fequdeihem] — forty [arba'im] thousand [elef] and-five [va-khamesh] hundreds [me'ot]."

> 40,500. **LXX:** identical figure.

**20** "And-beside him [ve-alav] the-tribe of [matteh] Manasseh [Mnasheh]; and-the-leader [ve-nasi'] of-the-sons of [li-vnei] Manasseh [Mnasheh] — Gamaliel [Gamli'el] son of [ben] Pedahzur [Pedahtsur]."

> **LXX:** Γαμαλιηλ υἱὸς Φαδασσουρ.

**21** "And-his-host [u-tseva'o] and-their-mustered-ones [u-fequdeihem] — two [shenayim] and-thirty [u-sheloshim] thousand [elef] and-two [u-matayim] hundreds [me'ot]."

> 32,200. **LXX:** identical figure.

**22** "And-the-tribe of [u-matteh] Benjamin [Vinyamin]; and-the-leader [ve-nasi'] of-the-sons of [li-vnei] Benjamin [Vinyamin] — Abidan [Avidan] son of [ben] Gideoni [Gid'oni]."

> **LXX:** Αβιδαν υἱὸς Γαδεωνι.

**23** "And-his-host [u-tseva'o] and-their-mustered-ones [u-fequdeihem] — five [khamishah] and-thirty [u-sheloshim] thousand [elef] and-four [ve-arba'] hundreds [me'ot]."

> 35,400. **LXX:** identical figure.

**24** "All [kol] the-mustered-ones [ha-pequdim] of-the-camp of [le-makhaneh] Ephraim [Efrayim] — a-hundred [me'ah] thousand [elef] and-eight [u-shemonat] thousands [alafim] and-a-hundred [u-me'ah], by-their-hosts [le-tsiv'otam]. And-third [u-shelishim] they-shall-set-out [yissa'u]."

> Total: 108,100. **Key term:** וּשְׁלִשִׁם יִסָּעוּ (u-shelishim yissa'u) = "and third they shall set out." **LXX:** τρίτοι ἐξαροῦσιν ("third they shall depart").

---

## The North Camp: Dan (vv. 25–31)

**25** "The-standard of [degel] the-camp of [makhaneh] Dan [Dan] — northward [tsafonah], by-their-hosts [le-tsiv'otam]; and-the-leader [ve-nasi'] of-the-sons of [li-vnei] Dan [Dan] — Ahiezer [Akhi'ezer] son of [ben] Ammishaddai [Ammi-shaddai]."

> **Key term:** צָפֹנָה (tsafonah) = "northward" — from צָפוֹן (tsafon, "north," lit. "hidden/dark"). **LXX:** πρὸς βορρᾶν ("toward the north").

**26** "And-his-host [u-tseva'o] and-their-mustered-ones [u-fequdeihem] — two [shenayim] and-sixty [ve-shishim] thousand [elef] and-seven [ve-sheva'] hundreds [me'ot]."

> 62,700. **LXX:** identical figure.

**27** "And-those-encamping [ve-ha-khonim] beside him [alav] — the-tribe of [matteh] Asher [Asher]; and-the-leader [ve-nasi'] of-the-sons of [li-vnei] Asher [Asher] — Pagiel [Pag'i'el] son of [ben] Ochran [Okhran]."

> **LXX:** Φαγαιηλ υἱὸς Εχραν.

**28** "And-his-host [u-tseva'o] and-their-mustered-ones [u-fequdeihem] — one [ekhad] and-forty [ve-arba'im] thousand [elef] and-five [va-khamesh] hundreds [me'ot]."

> 41,500. **LXX:** identical figure.

**29** "And-the-tribe of [u-matteh] Naphtali [Naftali]; and-the-leader [ve-nasi'] of-the-sons of [li-vnei] Naphtali [Naftali] — Ahira [Akhira'] son of [ben] Enan [Einan]."

> **LXX:** Αχιρε υἱὸς Αιναν.

**30** "And-his-host [u-tseva'o] and-their-mustered-ones [u-fequdeihem] — three [sheloshah] and-fifty [va-khamishim] thousand [elef] and-four [ve-arba'] hundreds [me'ot]."

> 53,400. **LXX:** identical figure.

**31** "All [kol] the-mustered-ones [ha-pequdim] of-the-camp of [le-makhaneh] Dan [Dan] — a-hundred [me'ah] thousand [elef] and-seven [ve-shiv'ah] and-fifty [va-khamishim] thousand [elef] and-six [ve-shesh] hundreds [me'ot]. At-the-last [la-akharonah] they-shall-set-out [yissa'u], by-their-standards [le-digleihem]."

> Total: 157,600. **Key term:** לָאַחֲרֹנָה יִסָּעוּ (la-akharonah yissa'u) = "at the last they shall set out" — the rear guard. **LXX:** ἔσχατοι ἐξαροῦσιν ("last they shall depart").

---

## The Grand Total and Obedience (vv. 32–34)

**32** These [elleh] are the-mustered-ones of [pequdei] the-sons of [benei] Israel [Yisra'el] by-the-house of [le-veit] their-fathers [avotam]: all [kol] the-mustered-ones of [pequdei] the-camps [ha-makhanot] by-their-hosts [le-tsiv'otam] — six [shesh] hundreds [me'ot] thousand [elef] and-three [u-sheloshet] thousands [alafim] and-five [va-khamesh] hundreds [me'ot] and-fifty [va-khamishim].

> Grand total: 603,550. **LXX:** identical figure. This matches the census total of 1:46.

**33** And-the-Levites [ve-ha-Levi'im] were-not [lo'] mustered [hotpaqdu] in-the-midst of [be-tokh] the-sons of [benei] Israel [Yisra'el], as [ka'asher] YHWH commanded [tsivvah] Moses [et-Mosheh].

> **Key term:** הָתְפָּקְדוּ (hotpaqdu) = "were mustered" — hothpaal of פקד, passive reflexive: "were enrolled among." **LXX:** οὐ συνεπεσκέπησαν ("were not mustered together with") — the prefix συν- ("with") makes explicit what the Hebrew implies.

**34** And-did [va-ya'asu] the-sons of [benei] Israel [Yisra'el] according-to-all [ke-khol] that [asher] YHWH commanded [tsivvah] Moses [et-Mosheh]: so [ken] they-encamped [khanu] by-their-standards [le-digleihem], and-so [ve-khen] they-set-out [nasa'u], each-man [ish] by-his-clans [le-mishpekhotav], by [al] the-house of [beit] his-fathers [avotav].

> **Key terms:** כֵּן חָנוּ ... וְכֵן נָסָעוּ (ken khanu ... ve-khen nasa'u) = "so they encamped ... and so they set out" — the double כֵּן affirms complete obedience. **LXX:** οὕτως παρενέβαλον ... καὶ οὕτως ἐξῇρον ("thus they encamped ... and thus they departed") — precisely mirrors the Hebrew double affirmation.

---

## Camp Summary Table

| Position | Standard | Tribes | Leader (first tribe) | Total |
|----------|----------|--------|---------------------|-------|
| East (קֵדְמָה) | Judah | Judah, Issachar, Zebulun | Nahshon ben Amminadab | 186,400 |
| South (תֵּימָנָה) | Reuben | Reuben, Simeon, Gad | Elizur ben Shedeur | 151,450 |
| Center | Levites + Tent of Meeting | — | — | (not counted) |
| West (יָמָּה) | Ephraim | Ephraim, Manasseh, Benjamin | Elishama ben Ammihud | 108,100 |
| North (צָפֹנָה) | Dan | Dan, Asher, Naphtali | Ahiezer ben Ammishaddai | 157,600 |
| **Grand Total** | | | | **603,550** |

---

*Manuscript: Leningrad Codex (B19A), pp. 147–148 (West Semitic Research Project, (c) Bruce E. Zuckerman); Codex Vaticanus (Vat.gr.1209), pp. 111–112 ((c) Biblioteca Apostolica Vaticana, digi.vatlib.it).*
